## Branch Safety

- [ ] This PR targets `source` for Next.js source, content, docs, or workflow changes.
- [ ] This PR does not target `main` unless it is an explicit static GitHub Pages publish PR.
- [ ] This PR does not delete `CNAME`, move raw Next.js source into the Pages root, or change live Pages output.

## Verification

- [ ] Ran `npm run workflow:check`
- [ ] Ran the task-appropriate lightweight checks
